content.en:
Yuangu Palace.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu and the other Supremes had once again opened their meeting.

"Guys, I investigated, but I couldn't find the person who spread the news!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu shook his head and said.

The Supreme of Cause and Effect also spoke: "I have no causal relationship with that mysterious person, although I found a force that traded with that mysterious person, deliberately destroyed that force on the grounds of that mysterious person, caused a little causal relationship, and even paid a certain price to forcibly promote the law of cause and effect, but I still didn't find the other party, as if that person didn't exist at all." Now, my strength has dropped greatly, and I have almost fallen out of the second-rank supreme combat power, and I can no longer use the causal secret technique for the time being!"

"It seems that the mysterious man is ready, and he is not afraid that we will investigate, forget it, then we will not check him. What about the reincarnated?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

The Golden Light Supreme spoke, "Everyone, I investigated, but nothing came of it. The universe is too big, and our numbers are too small to find the reincarnated ones unlikely. However, I spied on a piece of information from the Holy Light Clan, and the Holy Light Clan seems to have discovered a powerful master, far more than any other master, and even a Heavenly Venerable tracked down this master but disappeared. Although this is not a big deal, a strange master with great strength may really be a reincarnated person!"

"Jinguang Supreme is right, our individual strength is very strong, but in terms of collecting intelligence, it is indeed inferior to the Wan Clan, it is better to cooperate with the Wan Clan, and they will find the reincarnated person, once they find it, notify us, and we will hunt it down. After all, those reincarnated people have a lot of means, and even a third-rank supreme may not be able to capture a reincarnated person!"

"Okay, then I'll contact the other universe races, even if some races don't cooperate with us, but I think there must be races willing to cooperate with us, as long as you give a little benefit, I'm not afraid that there will be no collaborators!"

The Golden Light Supreme laughed.

......

Universe, Three Spirit Clan.

This is a small cosmic clan, and at this moment, on the planet R25, a planet of the Three Spirit Clan, a cold young man in black is sitting cross-legged on a mountain peak, seemingly cultivating, and seems to be sensing something.

Suddenly.

He opened his eyes with a solemn expression.

"News came from the 13th that our presence was exposed?"

He thought it was incredible!

He is No. 6, his real name is Chenjun, he is a member of the Tibetan God Organization, and he is ranked in the Earth Venerable Realm among the Tibetan Gods in his previous life, although he cannot match the Heavenly Mandate Realm, but his combat power at the peak can definitely easily kill the first-class supreme of this universe in seconds.

But now, he is only dominating the realm.

Originally, they planned to wait until after the Tianzun realm, and then slowly appear in this universe.

But now, almost all of them are in the realm of dominance, and their strength has not yet grown, and they have been completely exposed, even the name of the Tibetan God Organization has been exposed.

"There are traitors?"

Chenjun's first thought was this, but he quickly shook his head.

Traitors do not exist, they are all members of the Tibetan God Organization, and they all have huge backgrounds, and they have no connection with the natives of the universe before, how can they take refuge in these natives.

Besides, they almost all made a vow that they would not say anything about their plans.

Although the rumors did not reveal their plans, they did expose their existence, and it was impossible for them to be so stupid as to expose themselves.

Then there is only one possibility left!

"Isn't anyone going to be caught by the natives?"

Chenjun thought.

It's not impossible, but it's too low!

"We people are only the most dangerous in the early stage, once we find a secret realm, we can digest the resources of the secret realm and use it to improve our strength, and now we reincarnated people are basically in the domination realm. Usually in a secret realm, the Supremes can't find us. Even if you leave the secret realm, on the way to find other secret realms, if you are careful, there will hardly be any danger. Unless some reincarnated person is stupid enough to go to the Supreme for trouble, something will happen!"

Chenjun felt that there were really a few stupid forks who would do this, because some of the reincarnated people didn't take the natives here seriously at all, and maybe they would really be unlucky enough to be ambushed and then captured.

"It's hard for us reincarnated people to get in touch, and it's hard to figure out the situation, but we have to be careful next, otherwise we'll really fall into this universe!"

Chenjun thought.

Swish!

He left the planet because just now, he had sensed the existence of a secret realm, and he was going to that secret realm now.

----------

A hundred years later.

The news of the reincarnation has already spread to all corners of the entire universe, and all races in the universe attach great importance to the reincarnated person and are looking for the reincarnated person one after another.

Thanks to the efforts of all races in the universe, several reincarnated people have really been found.

After all, once the reincarnated person enters the territory of a certain universe clan, he may be treated as a foreign race, and once he fights, if his strength is exposed, he will attract the supreme, and his identity will naturally be exposed.

Although several reincarnated people were exposed, and even attracted the pursuit of those second-class and above supremes in the Twelve Universe Eras, they finally escaped with the help of various means.

So far, no one has been arrested.

There is no loss to the reincarnated, but many criminals and stowaways in the universe are unlucky, I don't know how many people died in this turmoil, and even some alien spies were found by various races and killed one by one.

Earth, the secret realm.

Ye Tian had been in retreat in this secret realm for a hundred years, and under the acceleration of time, the retreat time was relatively long.

"The eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied with the current progress, but in order to raise the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique from the Xiaocheng realm to the Dacheng realm, he had almost exhausted some useful resources in this secret realm, and the remaining resources were of little use to him, at most they would be used to cultivate clones or Heavenly Pavilion members in the future.

In addition to the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, Ye Tian also sorted out many of his true skills.

In the past, the True Technique Absolute Technique he created was a bit chaotic, but now he has observed and studied the True Technique Martial Arts in the chaos and many cultivation theories, and gradually made up for the shortcomings of his own cultivation path and improved it.

Nowadays, Ye Tian's combat skills are mainly divided into three major aspects: supernatural powers, chaotic true skills, and sword skills, and others, such as Tiangang's battle rules, belong to secret techniques, which are not counted as the three major categories.

In terms of supernatural powers, Ye Tian didn't need to cultivate for the time being, and the focus was on the two aspects of Chaos True Technique and Sword Technique.

Chaos True Technique, Ye Tian has also created some, such as the Black Lotus Realm, the Chaos God Golem, etc., but they are not systematic, and they have only been improving, which is a bit off.

In terms of knife skills, there are Tianyue Knife, Chaotian One Knife and the strongest secret technique - Hunyuan Slash!

And the Hunyuan Slash is a combination of the Chaos Dao and the Dao of the Dao, and it is also his pinnacle secret skill, which is not a sword skill in the strict sense.

In the past hundred years, Ye Tian has integrated many Chaos True Techniques and Sword Techniques to create two sets of systems.

The Chaos True Technique has become the Hunyuan Three Styles, and the Sword Technique is the Heavenly Sword Three Styles!

The reason why there are only three styles is because Ye Tian's perception is still low now, and he can't create too many moves.

The three styles of Hunyuan are the Hunyuan God and Demon Hand, the Hunyuan God Statue and the Hunyuan Domain, and the three styles of the Heavenly Sword are the Tianyue Knife, the Chaotian Knife, and the Heavenly Killing Knife, among which the Heavenly Killing Knife is a new knife path true technique created by Ye Tian stripped of the Hunyuan Slash and combined with many knife path secret techniques, although it is not as good as the Hunyuan Slash, but the power is also very powerful, and it can be used many times, which is definitely one of Ye Tian's powerful means.

In this way, Ye Tian can abandon some other useless true skills, and newly improve the Hunyuan Three Styles and the Heavenly Sword Three Styles, and in the future, he can increase the Hunyuan Four Styles and the Heavenly Sword Four Styles.

The most important thing is that the Hunyuan Slash will continue to improve according to these two systems in the future, and even create the Hunyuan two styles.

In short, the Hunyuan Slash System will be Ye Tian's strongest secret technique in the future.

"If you figure out the real skill system, there will be almost no bottlenecks in the future, and it will be easier to improve your strength. In the chaos, some powerful geniuses will basically choose their own exclusive system, and I have done this now, but my system is relatively strong, and it is naturally more difficult to improve, but with my talent, these are not a problem!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
